title: Create my listing with API
bodyHtml:
Before you start

Prefer a visual approach? You can create and manage your listings directly through the Back Office, where you can easily fill in forms and see your changes in real time. This article is specifically for sellers who want to use API integration.

 

Creating Products via API

We highly recommend referring to our comprehensive API documentation for the latest information on creating listings: Back Market - API Guidelines.

 

Getting Started

To make API calls with our database, you will need to enter an access token in your header. If you want to know how you can get your token, you can read the article Get your Token.

 

You can create a listing with API on our marketplace by sending an HTTP POST request. The endpoint of the request is https://www.backmarket.fr/ws/listings.

 

Request Header

The header of your request should be (it's the same for all requests):

Content-type: application/json
Accept: application/json
Accept-Language: COUNTRY_CODE
Authorization: Basic YOUR_ACCESS_TOKEN

 

Note that the listing will be activated in the country corresponding to the country code of your request. If you want to activate your listing in several countries, you have to make the same request for each country each time with a different country code.

 

Request Body

In the Body of your request, you must put the equivalent of the CSV file used to create listings.

 

There are mandatory fields and optional fields.

 

Mandatory fields for a listing:

 

  • the EAN or BACKMARKET_ID
  • the price
  • the quantity
  • the SKU
  • the state

For complete information on all fields (both mandatory and optional) to provide during listing creation, please refer to our API documentation: Back Market - API Guidelines

 

Example Request Body

Finally, the Body of your request should have this form:

{
    "encoding": "latin1",
    "delimiter": ";",
    "quotechar": "\"",
    "header": true,
    "catalog": "ean;category_id;title;description;brand;price_new;weight;image1;color;sim_lock;screen_size;model;storage;sku;quantity;price;state;\n8018417227790;2;iPhone 7 White 64 Go;This is the iphone 7 of state super shiny description;Apple;960;325;http://images.neteven.com/evenmarketplace/images_telephone/iphone7.jpg;White;SFR;4,7;iPhone 7;64;iphone7sku1;25;700;0;\n8018417227790;2;iPhone 7 White 64 Go;This is the iphone 7 of state bronze description;Apple;960;325;http://images.neteven.com/evenmarketplace/images_telephone/iphone7.jpg;White;SFR;4,7;iPhone 7;64;iphone7sku2;20;600;3;\n0190198067456;1;Old school phone title;This is an old school phone of state super shiny description;Nokia;310;325;http://images.neteven.com/evenmarketplace/images_telephone/nokia.jpg;White;SFR;2,2;Nokia 32xx;;nokia32xxsku1;25;200;0;\n0190198067456;1;Old school phone title;This is an old school phone of state bronze  description;Nokia;310;325;http://images.neteven.com/evenmarketplace/images_telephone/nokia.jpg;White;SFR;2,2;Nokia 32xx;;nokia32xxsku2;10;140;3;\n"
}
